Risk: Silent data loss during offline create/update/delete
Required evidence: Queue, persistence, forced termination, retry, reconciliation, multi-device
Firestore emulator rules tests plus negative authorization matrix

Risk: Account deletion leaves remote or local personal data
Required evidence: End-to-end deletion verification and retained-data inventory

Risk: Authentication routing traps user or exposes another session
Required evidence: State-machine tests across launch, revoke, sign-out, profile failure

Risk: Duplicate or conflicting entries after reconnection
Required evidence: Conflict, dedupe and idempotency integration suite
VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, focus, labels, contrast and Reduce Motion regression
Crashlytics symbol validation, phased release and thresholds

Risk: Firebase billing or function usage spike
Required evidence: Budgets, alerts, dashboards, rate limits and runbook
Synthetic large-dataset benchmarks and launch/timeline budgets
